data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Extensive use of Microsoft Azure for hosting and services.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure's global infrastructure for scalability and reliability.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Modular service design allowing frequent updates and independent scaling.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services using containers and orchestration via Kubernetes.

data.title: Single Page Applications (SPA)
data.description: Enhancing user experience with responsive and fast interactions.
data.technical_spec: Built with Angular for dynamic content rendering, minimizing page reloads.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Fast content delivery to global users.
data.technical_spec: Azure CDN integration speeds up data access times.

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: APIs for seamless third-party integrations and data interactions.
data.technical_spec: Use of OpenAPI for defining API contracts and facilitating developer access.
